simple_types.name: DPLL_Lock_Time
simple_types.code:
type DPLL_Lock_Time is
  (
   Default,
   Lock_800Us,
   Lock_900Us,
   Lock_1Ms,
   Lock_1P1Ms)
  with Size => 3;

simple_types.name: DPLL_Reference_Clock
simple_types.code: type DPLL_Reference_Clock is (GCLK_Ref, XOSC32K_Ref, XOSC0_Ref, XOSC1_Ref);

subprograms.name: Configure_DFLL

documentation.description:
See the reference manual of your device for more information on the
configuration of DFLL.

subprograms.name: Configure_DPLL

documentation.description:
See the reference manual of your device for more information on the
configuration of DPLLs.
